user.description: Create a Home Assistant integration client in Daynest first, then paste the generated client ID and secret here. This setup is manual and does not open a Daynest sign-in page yet. If you need help, have a look at the [documentation]({documentation_url}).

data_description.client_id: Use the client ID shown in Daynest Settings → Integration clients when you create a Home Assistant client.
data_description.client_secret: Use the generated client secret from Daynest. This is shown once when the client is created or rotated.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the Daynest-managed client ID and secret, then rotate the client in Daynest if needed.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Daynest host.
error.unsupported_contract: The Daynest server contract version is not supported by this integration.

update_failed.message: Failed to update data from the server.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Triggers an immediate data refresh from the Daynest backend. Useful after making changes in the Daynest app to update Home Assistant sensors without waiting for the next scheduled poll.

complete_task.name: Complete Task
complete_task.description: Marks a Daynest chore instance as complete. Requires the Daynest Home Assistant client to have the ha:write scope.

chore_instance_id.name: Chore Instance ID
chore_instance_id.description: The numeric ID of the chore instance to mark as complete. Obtain this ID from the Daynest app or API.

snooze_task.name: Snooze Task
snooze_task.description: Reschedules a Daynest chore instance to a later date. Requires the Daynest Home Assistant client to have the ha:write scope.

chore_instance_id.name: Chore Instance ID
chore_instance_id.description: The numeric ID of the chore instance to reschedule. Obtain this ID from the Daynest app or API.

days.name: Days
days.description: Number of days to snooze the task (1–30). Defaults to 1.

mark_medication_taken.name: Mark Medication Taken
mark_medication_taken.description: Marks a scheduled medication dose as taken. Requires the Daynest Home Assistant client to have the ha:write scope.

medication_dose_id.name: Medication Dose ID
medication_dose_id.description: The numeric ID of the medication dose instance to mark as taken. Obtain this ID from the Daynest app or API.

skip_task.name: Skip Task
skip_task.description: Skips a Daynest chore instance. Requires the Daynest Home Assistant client to have the ha:write scope.

chore_instance_id.name: Chore Instance ID
chore_instance_id.description: The numeric ID of the chore instance to skip.

skip_medication.name: Skip Medication Dose
skip_medication.description: Skips a scheduled medication dose. Requires the Daynest Home Assistant client to have the ha:write scope.

medication_dose_id.name: Medication Dose ID
medication_dose_id.description: The numeric ID of the medication dose instance to skip.
